title: Trying to create a BOOK with invalid data types
gherkin:
When the user tries to create a "BOOK" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | title | true |
  | author | true |
  | publisher | true |
  | year_of_publication | true |
  | isbn | true |
  | pages | true |
  | language | true |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
